title: Faulty Queue Dequeue from Front Implementation

statement.markdown:
Given a queue and an element, implement a function to remove the element at the front of the queue.

The function should return True if the removal is successful and False otherwise. In case the queue is empty, it should return False.

Note that the function should modify the original queue.
statement.inputFormat: A queue implemented as an array or linked list, and an element to be removed.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the removal was successful.
statement.notes: The queue size should not exceed 10000.

examples.input: Example input (matching the stdin format that main wrapper expects)
